scripts.prefetch:merge: node scripts/prefetch-merge-assets.mjs --in merge-props.json --out merge-props.local.json --public public --dir prefetched
scripts.render:merge: node scripts/render-merge-with-timestamp.mjs --props merge-props.local.json --outDir out --baseName merged --composition MergeSegments --concurrency 1
scripts.merge:local: npm run prefetch:merge && npm run render:merge
scripts.render:merge:example: node scripts/render-merge-with-timestamp.mjs --props merge-props.example.json --outDir out --baseName merged-example --composition MergeSegments --concurrency 1
